name: Mango-Lime Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the mango with lime juice until smooth.
2. Strain the mixture to remove any seeds or pulp.
Serve with shellfish or as a dessert sauce. Serves 4.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 38.8 calories; 0.1 grams total fat; (0 grams saturated fat); 0.2 grams protein; 9.2 grams carbohydrates; 0 milligrams cholesterol; 1.0 milligrams sodium.
